landing.headline: Your entire agency. In one platform.
landing.lead: Manage customers, policies and notifications in a modern, secure and multi-tenant environment.
landing.rolesIntro: Pick your role to sign in to your area.

customer.title: CUSTOMER
customer.subtitle: Insured
customer.description: See your policies, download documents and track renewals.

agencyAdmin.title: AGENCY
agencyAdmin.subtitle: Agency Administrator
agencyAdmin.description: Manage employees, customers, policies and reports of your office.

agencyUser.title: STAFF
agencyUser.subtitle: Agency Employee
agencyUser.description: Register customers and policies, manage daily tasks.

producer.title: PRODUCER
producer.subtitle: Partner
producer.description: Track your own policies, production and commissions.

platform.title: PLATFORM ADMIN
platform.subtitle: Super Admin
platform.description: Create and manage insurance agencies on the platform.

multi.title: Many agencies, one platform
multi.body: Full data isolation per agency. Every office has its own secure environment.

easy.title: One-click customer onboarding
easy.body: Register a new customer and we automatically create their portal account.

secure.title: Secure from day one
secure.body: JWT authentication, hashed passwords, audit log, automatic role-based access.

auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Contact your agency.

tenants.title: Insurance Agencies
tenants.createSubtitle: A new agency is created together with its first administrator.
tenants.name: Agency name
tenants.codeHelp: Latin letters, numbers, dashes or underscores only.

customers.title: Customers
customers.createHelp: Fill in the basics. Optionally we'll automatically create the customer's portal account.
customers.createdWithPortal: Hand the customer these credentials so they can sign in to the portal:
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, VAT or customer #...
customers.noCustomers: No customers yet. Click 'New Customer' to start.
